prompt: Create a highly detailed anime fantasy illustration of a celestial sorceress seated gracefully on a dark wooden library ladder-stool in an enormous antique magical library. She is a young elegant witch with very long flowing soft pink hair and violet eyes, reading an open dark grimoire with gold astrological markings. She wears a luxurious full celestial mage outfit in deep midnight navy and black with ornate gold embroidery: exactly 7 main outfit pieces are visible, including 1 oversized pointed witch hat with a wide brim, 1 jeweled star-and-sun crown ornament with a large blue gem, 1 fitted dark bodice dress with white ruffled lace trim, 1 short layered skirt with pale ruffles underneath, 1 long asymmetrical cape covered in constellations and zodiac-like diagrams, 2 black thigh-high stockings with gold garter details, and 2 glossy black high-heeled ankle boots decorated with dangling gold star chains and blue jewels. Add abundant delicate gold chains, star charms, crescent moons, constellations, pearls, and blue gemstones across the hat, cape, collar, sleeves, waist, thighs, and boots. Her pose is calm and slightly coy, one knee raised, the other leg angled down, both hands holding the book, face turned toward the viewer with a soft mysterious expression. The setting is a towering Victorian occult library filled with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, warm shafts of sunlight, carved wood, brass railings, and many astronomical instruments. Include exactly 5 prominent magical library props around her: 1 open astrology book in the foreground, 1 brass armillary sphere to the right, 1 glowing blue orb on a stand to the left, 1 hanging lantern above, and 1 leafy green plant near the right shelves. Use a rich navy, gold, bronze, and warm amber palette with sparkling dust motes, intricate linework, luxurious fabric texture, dramatic depth, and cinematic lighting. Vertical composition, ultra-detailed, polished Japanese anime style, elegant fantasy fashion illustration, no modern objects, no extra characters, no watermark, no readable signature.
